name: Joseph Everett Grgic
title: Senior UX Researcher & Designer
bio: Senior UX Professional and Human Factors specialist with extensive experience at major tech companies. Positioned at the intersection of cognitive psychology and product strategy, engineering the mental models that make products work.
specializations: Reducing cognitive load in complex environments
Trust and confidence in AI systems
threePillars: Applying human factors science to interface design
Prioritizing ethical strategy that balances business objectives with transparent, respectful user experiences
Drawing on international tech experience while building presence in the European market
currentFocus: Research on trust and confidence between humans and AI systems. Applies CASA (Computers Are Social Actors) paradigm to explore how design cues influence user perception of AI.
